articles.title: Sony’s new Xperia phone gets an overdue redesign
articles.description: Sony's Xperia 1 flagships have looked more or less the same since 2020, but that's finally changing with the Xperia 1 VIII, which moves to a chunky square camera island. The phone also boasts what should be a substantially improved telephoto camera, along with an AI camera assistant that looks like an improved version of […]
articles.author: Dominic Preston
